title: BambooHR vs Expensify
description: Compare BambooHR vs Expensify — a hr & people platform versus a finance & accounting solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: BambooHR (HR & People) and Expensify (Finance & Accounting) serve different primary purposes. BambooHR has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is hr & people or finance & accounting capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between BambooHR and Expensify?
faqs.answer: BambooHR is a hr & people tool, while Expensify is a finance & accounting platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can BambooHR replace Expensify?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, BambooHR or Expensify?
faqs.answer: BambooHR (Custom) and Expensify ($5-9/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
